templates.name: DFS - Graph (Iterative)
templates.example: Traverse graph using stack. Push unvisited nodes and explore as far as possible before backtracking.

templates.name: BFS - Graph (Iterative)
templates.example: Traverse graph level-by-level using queue. Visit all neighbors before moving to next level.

templates.name: Binary Tree - Inorder Traversal
templates.example: Visit nodes in Left-Root-Right order. Use stack for iterative: go left first, then process node, then go right.

templates.name: Binary Tree - Preorder Traversal
templates.example: Visit nodes in Root-Left-Right order. Process node first, then explore children.

templates.name: Binary Tree - Postorder Traversal
templates.example: Visit nodes in Left-Right-Root order. Process children first, then the node.

templates.name: Binary Tree - Level Order (BFS)
templates.example: Traverse tree level by level. Use queue to maintain order of nodes at each level.

templates.name: Two Pointer - Merge Sorted Arrays
templates.example: Merge two sorted arrays using two pointers from the back. Avoid overwriting by filling from end to start.

templates.name: Two Pointer - Reverse Array
templates.example: Reverse array with left and right pointers starting from ends. Swap and move inward.

templates.name: Two Pointer - Remove Duplicates
templates.example: Remove duplicates from sorted array in-place. Use one pointer for unique position, one for scanning.

templates.name: Sliding Window - Maximum in Window
templates.example: Find max in each k-sized window. Use deque to maintain useful elements in decreasing order.

templates.name: Sliding Window - Longest Substring Without Repeating
templates.example: Find longest substring without duplicate chars. Expand window with right pointer, contract with left if duplicate found.

templates.name: Sliding Window - Minimum Window Substring
templates.example: Find smallest window containing all chars from target. Expand right, contract left, track minimum.

templates.name: Binary Search - Sorted Array
templates.example: Search element in sorted array. Eliminate half on each comparison using mid pointer.

templates.name: Binary Search - Rotated Sorted Array
templates.example: Search in rotated sorted array. Identify which half is sorted, then decide which side to search.

templates.name: Dynamic Programming - Fibonacci
templates.example: Compute nth Fibonacci bottom-up. Build array from base cases: dp[i] = dp[i-1] + dp[i-2].

templates.name: Dynamic Programming - Coin Change
templates.example: Minimum coins for amount. For each amount, try all coins and take minimum result.

templates.name: Dynamic Programming - 0/1 Knapsack
templates.example: Max value with weight limit. For each item, decide include/exclude based on weight constraint.

templates.name: BFS - Shortest Path in Unweighted Graph
templates.example: Find shortest path between two nodes. BFS guarantees shortest path in unweighted graphs.

templates.name: Dijkstra - Shortest Path Weighted Graph
templates.example: Find shortest path with weights. Use priority queue, always process node with min distance.

templates.name: Topological Sort - DFS
templates.example: Order nodes such that parents before children. Use DFS with stack, add node after processing children.

templates.name: Heap - Heapify
templates.example: Convert array to heap. Heapify down from last parent node. O(N) time bottom-up.

templates.name: Heap - Extract Max
templates.example: Remove max from heap. Swap last element to root, then heapify down to maintain property.

templates.name: Heap - Insert Element
templates.example: Add element to heap. Insert at end, then heapify up (bubble up) to maintain property.

templates.name: Union-Find - Union Operation
templates.example: Merge two sets. Find roots of both elements and connect one root to other.

templates.name: Union-Find - Find with Path Compression
templates.example: Find root efficiently. Optimize by making each node point directly to root (path compression).

templates.name: Linked List - Reverse
templates.example: Reverse linked list in-place. Use three pointers: prev, current, next. Reverse links one by one.

templates.name: Linked List - Merge Two Sorted Lists
templates.example: Merge two sorted linked lists. Compare nodes, attach smaller to result, move pointer forward.

templates.name: Linked List - Cycle Detection
templates.example: Detect cycle using Floyd's algorithm. Slow (1 step) and fast (2 steps) pointers meet if cycle exists.

templates.name: String - Check Palindrome
templates.example: Check if string is palindrome. Compare chars from both ends moving inward.

templates.name: String - Check Anagram
templates.example: Check if two strings are anagrams. Count characters, both should have same frequency.

templates.name: String - Regex Pattern Matching
templates.example: Match string with pattern containing . and *. Use 2D DP where dp[i][j] = match up to position i and j.
